rules.rule: At advanced level, a 2–3% improvement in any metric can be the difference between winning and losing.
rules.reason: Elite performance improvement is about compounding small gains, not fixing obvious mistakes.

rules.rule: Measure technical quality at full fatigue — not just in fresh conditions.
rules.reason: Advanced players must maintain technique in the 80th minute. Training only when fresh does not prepare for this.

rules.rule: Tailor technical sessions to exploit specific opponent weaknesses.
rules.reason: Advanced players have the tactical awareness to translate technical skill into match-specific advantages.

rules.rule: Combine physical repetitions with mental visualisation of perfect execution.
rules.reason: Neuroscience shows that mental rehearsal activates the same motor pathways as physical practice.
